The '''Storm Fleet''' was a secret [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] fleet made up of [[Storm Fleet destroyer|destroyers]] that was meant to conquer [[Planet/Legends|planets]] with their large amounts of firepower.<ref name="SFW" />

==History==
The fleet consisted of at least twelve warships, their number indicated by the fact the fleet was occupying twelve docking different docking bays, bays 1211 through to 1222. They were disguised as [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] to avoid detection by [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] forces. [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] delayed the fleets first mission to [[Cyphar/Legends|Cyphar]] by [[Battle of the Llon Nebulae|destroying]] two ships at the [[Llon Nebulae/Legends|Llon Nebulae]].<ref name="SFW /> The remainder of the fleet pushed on only to be defeated in the [[Battle of Cyphar]] where nearly half of the remaining ships were lost to the reinforcing Republic fleet.<ref name="TNEC" />
